body:

Team,

Alabama has a special election coming up to fill Jeff Sessions' Senate seat and with today's primary election results in, we have an official Democratic nominee: Doug Jones.

Doug is the son of a steelworker and as a former U.S. Attorney, he brought members of the KKK to justice for the 1963 16th Street Baptist Church bombing in Birmingham.

[**Chip in $1 now to help kick off Doug 's campaign with a strong show of support and ensure we have the resources to take on Republicans everywhere.**](http://action.dscc. Alabama has been represented by Republican Senators for a long time and we know we face an uphill climb. But we also know we can't win what we don't fight for -- so we're going to fight even in tough territory.

That's why we're launching an organizing program in Alabama to lay the foundation for a strong Democratic Senate campaign that competes for every vote.

[**Chip in $1 now to help launch our organizing program in the Alabama special election and fund all our efforts to take on Republican Senate candidates everywhere.**](http://action.dscc. subject: Quick Signature Needed: Don’t let Big Oil drill in our oceans
body:
[URGENT: The Trump administration is trying expand offshore drilling to the Atlantic Ocean. Fight back NOW >>](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/YjHFB/6/Y8/r5cs/6ZT6MU/zSEBtWrSkc/P)

|
---|---
| |
| **DEADLINE TOMORROW!**

Donald Trump is trying to expand offshore drilling to the Atlantic Ocean- don't let our waters and coasts become a playground for Big Oil!

We're gathering 150,000 public comments standing up for our lands by the deadline!

[Sign NOW](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/YjHFB/s/Y8/r5cs/6ZT6MU/6nOvAvSNr7/P) |
Activist - Offshore drilling is a recipe for disaster.

>From the Florida coast to the Jersey Shore, all the way up to the Maine, our beaches are top destinations for visitors from around the world. These healthy coasts and waterways provide the foundation for our vibrant communities, ecosystems, and economies up and down the Atlantic.

**One oil spill from offshore drilling could wipe out livelihoods and critical natural resources for generations.**

For years, we have fought (and won!) against attempts to drill in the Atlantic Ocean, but now the Trump administration is trying to give Big Oil a greenlight to drill along our coast. Our economy, tourism, and environment cannot afford to be under constant threat of a giant oil spill that could threaten generations to come. **We must reignite the fight to keep offshore drilling out of the Atlantic - the health and integrity of our coastal communities depends on it!**

[The Trump administration is putting the entire Atlantic seaboard at risk. Submit a public comment TODAY: Tell Big Oil to STAY OUT of the Atlantic >>](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/YjHFB/v/Y8/r5cs/6ZT6MU/vtU8xJrLiF/P)

If drilling in the Atlantic Ocean is authorized, it would be the first time Big Oil's drills have been operating off the East Coast in decades. And **we know from the Exxon Valdez spill in Alaska and the horrific Deepwater Horizon spill in the Gulf that Big Oil cannot be trusted to protect our communities or our environment.**

Hundreds of thousands of Americans earn their livelihoods in the fishing, tourism, and recreation industries along the Atlantic coast. Despite whatever claims the oil industry may make about safety improvements, drilling is never 100 percent safe and oil spills, whether caused by nature or human error, would devastate coastal communities and marine ecosystems.

These risks aren't stopping the Trump administration from supporting Big Oil and promoting a "Drill, Baby, Drill" energy policy. Don't let Big Polluters have free rein over the environment -- they'll do whatever it takes to make a profit. We've won this fight before and we can do it again, but only with your help.

[**Our coast and waters are under threat! Leave a public comment TODAY and help protect the Atlantic from offshore drilling >>**](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/YjHFB/z/Y8/r5cs/6ZT6MU/vrQcr2GnIe/P)

The East Coast cares deeply about its beaches, ocean ecosystems, and families. Thank you for all you do to protect our coasts.

Kristin Brown
Director of Digital Strategy
League of Conservation Voters

If you wish to stop receiving our emails or change your subscription options, please [Manage Your Subscription](http://demolinks.us/u/OTg0MjAvMC8xOTM2Njk2LzAvMTg4LzAvNmQyYjUzMWYyNDIzMDVlZjBlYTdjNDEyODZkMzM3MWUvMTM0NTM0NjIy)
Democrats.com, Box 1452, New York, NY 10276

There's been a lot of news in the last 24 hours, hasn't there, team?

So much so that you may have missed the news that there was a special election in Alabama to permanently fill Jeff Sessions' seat.

Democrats now have our nominee and his name is Doug Jones, a former U.S. attorney who successfully prosecuted two KKK members responsible for the 16th Street Baptist Church bombing.

[**Chip in $1 to help elect Democratic senators in 2017 and 2018, starting with the special election in Alabama happening later this year.**](http://action.dscc. The Republicans are going to a run-off. Their two candidates are Roy Moore, the judge best known for refusing to remove the Ten Commandments from a public courthouse, and Trump ally and sitting Senator Luther Strange. And while they waste resources on divisive infighting, we have a few weeks to get prepared.

If we can do well in Alabama, then we can do well everywhere. **Chip in $1 now to help launch our organizing efforts in Alabama and elect Democratic senators everywhere:**

| | Peter -- You should have seen the faces on our campaign when Joe told us he wanted to kick off his re-election campaign with a six-day statewide RV tour.

Getting Joe's message to voters across the state -- whether it's on next week's RV tour or on TV -- isn't gonna be easy. **But Joe 's right too. We've got the hardest working campaign in the country.**

name: Nina Turner, Our Revolution
subject: The "Alt-Left"
body:
We have a president who insists on siding with white supremacists.
#
Friends,
We have a president who insists on siding with white supremacists. He will not denounce those with hate in their heart who murdered a young woman for supporting equality. For so many of us, we are now living in a nightmare. It is unconscionable to compare those who fight for equality with those who believe that the color of one's skin determines superiority.
As I said recently, my heart is skipping beats to think about all that my fore-parents endured to get to this point in time in America's history. And to have, in the 21st century, the president of the United States not boldly stand up and denounce racial violence is atrocious. Not only does he refuse to condemn the actions of people who would protest the funeral of someone they murdered, but he also dares to try and equivocate the actions of liberal protesters, the so called "alt-left," with those of Nazis and white supremacists. It is a disgusting false equivalency.
There is no such thing as the "alt-left." Those who believe Medicare should be available to all Americans are not the same as Nazis. Those who believe that we must fix a broken criminal justice system that is unfair to black, brown and poor are not the same as Nazis. Those who think we should remove statues that were erected as a reminder of white supremacy are not the same as Nazis.
What happens next is crucial for the future of our country. We must stand united for a better life for all, regardless of color, gender, sexual orientation, religion or class. It has never been more clear what the differences between the two sides are. There is the side of justice and the side of injustice. It is obvious what side Trump is on. There are more of us standing on the side of justice and together we will overcome the forces seeking to regress our nation. Our stories are our strength share yours with us. [**What motivates you to fight for social justice?**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7afe4/bed43eb/c32a760/75ff9737/465213718/VEsH/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/social-justice?source=em170816")
In solidarity,
Nina Turner
President
Our Revolution
